brand.name: Captapi
brand.positioning: One REST API for structured public social-media data

verified_product_facts: Captapi returns clean JSON through a REST API.
One API key covers multiple social platforms.
Available data includes profiles, posts, comments, transcripts, and AI summaries, depending on platform.
Captapi has TypeScript and Python SDKs.
Captapi has an MCP server, CLI, n8n node, Apify Actor, and Make integration.
The free tier includes 100 credits and does not require a card.
Shared caching can make repeated requests free when a cached response is available.
approved_ctas: Test the endpoint without a card.
Replace one brittle scraper and compare the result.
prohibited_claims: Do not claim Captapi is an official partner of any social network.
Do not promise a specific latency unless it is supplied as campaign data.
Do not invent customer, request, revenue, accuracy, or uptime numbers.
Do not claim every endpoint is native or proxy-free.
Do not disparage a competitor or imply its service is broken.

visual_direction.disclosure: The account bio and every Reel caption must clearly say Mara is an AI avatar.
